# UBrain

> Natural brain health supplements powered by science. Developed with NTU Singapore researchers. GMP-certified by HSA Singapore.

## Products

- [UBrain Focus & Memory](https://ubrain.sg/product/ubrain-focus-memory) — S$88. Natural ALA, EPA, DHA + L-phenylalanine for students and young professionals (ages 5-50).
- [UBrain Motor Regain 100](https://ubrain.sg/product/ubrain-motor-regain) — S$98. Most potent formula for Parkinson's, dementia, and neurodegenerative conditions.
- [UBrain MG-100](https://ubrain.sg/product/ubrain-mg100) — S$98. All-natural migraine relief from Portulacaceae + Cupressaceae tropical herbs.
- [UBrain Memory Recovery](https://ubrain.sg/product/ubrain-memory-recovery) — S$98. Dual-mode memory support: solution mode (3 caps) and prevention mode (2 caps).

## About UBrain

UBrain is a Singapore-based brain health brand by The Biolabs Pte Ltd. Our proprietary blend of all-natural tropical herbs was developed over years of research in collaboration with Nanyang Technological University (NTU) School of Biological Sciences. All products are manufactured in a GMP-certified facility approved by the Health Sciences Authority (HSA) of Singapore.
